Video.summary: Rachel kidnaps a young boy whom she suspects witnessed a murder.
Video.title: The Lady Vanishes

Video.summary: After shooting a dangerous armed robber, a cop is accused of murdering an unarmed man.
Video.title: Ghost

Video.summary: Tony helps a friend cope with his wife's death during a burglary case, while David loses his gift money.
Video.title: A Christmas Story

Video.summary: Tony sets out to prove a mental patient isn't guilty of murder.
Video.title: Head Case

Video.summary: Tony helps a distraught father locate the son he lost to a witness relocation program.
Video.title: Hidden

Video.summary: Reno's surprise reunion with Leeza Bendetti at Bobby's scenic Duck Lake cabin is soured when he stumbles upon a trio of drug dealers and their rolling narcotics lab in the adjoining woods.
Video.title: Rabbit Redux

Video.summary: Reno tracks Hound Adams, the only man who can clear Reno's name, to a Carlsbad sports bar.
Video.title: Hostage

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Bobby and a reluctant Reno head to San Francisco when Bobby is contacted by a Import/Export magnate to find alleged Industrial spy Rikki Yeager.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 1

Video.summary: After Reno saves Rikki Yeager from a psychotic bounty hunter, his attempt to turn her over goes up in smoke when the plane sent for their transport explodes in an obvious ambush plot.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 2

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Rita Infiltrates a phone sex operation to find a murderer.
Video.title: Voices

Video.summary: Although Rita objects, a gigolo/killer-turned-writer is released on parole into the custody of his publisher. When the publisher's oversexed wife is found murdered, Rita immediately suspects the parolee but later learns that he's innocent of this crime.
Video.title: Crime Of Love

Video.summary: Three fhends are stalked by a serial killer; Chris worries after turning to Cotton for help with a tax audit.
Video.title: Team Spirit

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: A private investigator's death while scuba diving leads Cassy and Tom to pirates salvaging sunken treasures.
Video.title: Pirates Of Palm Beach

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy expose a man who staged a shark attack in order to murder his wife.
Video.title: Slip-Up

Video.summary: Tom is intimidated by an old football teammate who's helping with a murder investigation.
Video.title: Rage

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation a prep school teacher's apparent suicide uncovers his affair with a student.
Video.title: Teacher's Pet

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy uncover a murder victim's search for her sister's rapist.
Video.title: Sea Of Love

Video.summary: The death of a research scientist draws Tom and Cassy into a secret project searching for extraterrestrial life.
Video.title: Total Eclipse

Video.summary: A pair of Miami Beach detectives try to protect an important witness from being killed by his mob boss.
Video.title: Three Ring Circus

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ
